jobDuties.title: Product Strategy & Vision ($1B+ Platforms)
jobDuties.description: Defines product vision and strategy for digital assets supporting $1B+ annual revenue; leads Agile delivery.

jobDuties.title: Full Lifecycle & Budget Management
jobDuties.description: Manages full product lifecycle for enterprise CMS/websites, including budget oversight and cost optimization (e.g., 30% under budget on major projects).

jobDuties.title: Data-Driven Requirements & Roadmap
jobDuties.description: Conducts market research, defines complex requirements using data/KPIs, owns feature prioritization and roadmap execution.

jobDuties.title: Operations, QA & System Transitions
jobDuties.description: Oversees product operations, maintenance, QA, system transitions (e.g., GA4 migration), and data migrations.

jobDuties.title: Leadership & Technical Design
jobDuties.description: Leads cross-functional collaboration, stakeholder/vendor management, directs Agile methodologies, and leads technical design (system architecture, tech stack upgrades like Next.js/ARC, multi-org HubSpot).

jobDuties.title: Hands-On Full-Stack Development
jobDuties.description: Actively develops applications/APIs, advanced CRM/Marketing Automation solutions (HubSpot), sales/internal tooling (image optimizer, dynamic offers sync), and optimizes code (revalidation logic).

jobDuties.title: Process Improvement & Mentorship
jobDuties.description: Drives continuous improvement, process standardization (JIRA for feedback/issues), and mentorship.

jobDuties.title: Website Management & Full-Stack Development
jobDuties.description: Executed end-to-end website management (development, redesigns, maintenance, content, performance monitoring using Google Analytics, GTM, Looker Studio, HotJar) and full-stack development (HTML, CSS, JS, Node.js, Next.js).

jobDuties.title: Digital Marketing Technical Execution
jobDuties.description: Provided technical execution for digital marketing campaigns (SEO, PPC setup) and email marketing enhancements (dynamic modules).

jobDuties.title: CRM Integration & HubSpot API Mastery
jobDuties.description: Managed lead generation platforms, CRM integrations (HubSpot), developed custom marketing tools, API/feeds (Facebook, Zillow, HubSpot), and mastered HubSpot API (OAuth 2.0, Custom Objects, API reports).

jobDuties.title: System Architecture & Database Design
jobDuties.description: Designed new inventory databases (MongoDB, BDX XML), architected system solutions (TV signage platform, custom CRM blueprinting), and implemented GIT version control.

jobDuties.title: Project Ownership & Strategic Initiatives (Growth to PM)
jobDuties.description: Progressively took product ownership for web projects: roadmap creation, feasibility evaluation, leading custom website/CMS development, and managing technical aspects of rebranding/acquisition integrations.

jobDuties.title: Digital Campaign Strategy & Execution
jobDuties.description: Planned and executed digital marketing campaigns (Email, Social Media, PPC, Content, Affiliates), exceeding quarterly revenue goals by up to 40%.

jobDuties.title: SEO/SEM & Paid Advertising Management (>$100K Budget)
jobDuties.description: Implemented SEO strategies (boosting conversion 34%, revenue 17%), managed SEM, external agencies, and administered paid ad campaigns (>$100K budget), increasing social ad conversion 136%.

jobDuties.title: Marketing-Focused Web Development (WordPress, PHP, JS)
jobDuties.description: Performed WordPress development (JavaScript, PHP), server-side coding (PHP, MySQL), custom module development, and responsive web design (HTML, CSS, Bootstrap).

jobDuties.title: CRO, Analytics, Reporting & Technical Marketing Ops
jobDuties.description: Owned Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) efforts, including A/B testing (VWO), managed KPIs, data analysis, reporting (Google Analytics, Looker Studio), campaign tagging (GTM), and MySQL database (1M+ leads) for segmentation.

jobDuties.title: Workflow Optimization & Project Leadership
jobDuties.description: Optimized marketing/dev workflows (sped delivery 10%), led QA for website redesigns, supported 5 new product launches, and implemented MS Sharepoint Intranet.

jobDuties.title: E-commerce Platform & Sales Growth Management (259% Growth)
jobDuties.description: Managed corporate Magento website/web-store, driving 259% sales growth in 3 months through listing optimization.

jobDuties.title: Multi-Platform CRM Strategy & Data-Driven Operations
jobDuties.description: Developed/executed CRM strategy (Amazon, Magento); conducted daily data analysis (Pricing, Inventory, Ads, Shipping, ODR, Sales) improving operational efficiency by 20%.

jobDuties.title: Advanced Product Listing, PPC Optimization & New Product Launches
jobDuties.description: Created advanced eBay listings (HTML/CSS), reduced PPC cost per click by 20%, and launched new products on various e-commerce platforms.

jobDuties.title: Sales Channel Expansion & SEO Strategy (30% YoY Growth)
jobDuties.description: Expanded sales channels (Amazon EU, eBay, Walmart, etc.) achieving 30% YoY revenue growth; developed SEO strategies boosting visibility 18%.

jobDuties.title: Financial Performance Reporting & Customer Experience
jobDuties.description: Handled financial/sales tax accounting, KPI collection, and improved customer experience (95% satisfaction) through efficient inquiry handling and email campaigns.

jobDuties.title: New Product Introduction Management
jobDuties.description: Managed new product introductions across multiple e-commerce platforms.

jobDuties.title: QA Process Improvement & Test Case Development
jobDuties.description: Provided technical assistance in testing, actively modified quality testing processes, and wrote test cases.

jobDuties.title: Defect Management & Reporting (JIRA)
jobDuties.description: Evaluated and meticulously reported software defects and change requests via JIRA, contributing to 25% reduction in defect resolution time.

jobDuties.title: Development Team Coordination for Testing
jobDuties.description: Coordinated effectively with development teams to create and execute comprehensive test plans, scenarios, and cases.
